$comment: add_unit: generate ONE unit of a composed Go system into the active workspace. Reads its spec (workspaces/<ws>/specs/<specfile>) + the module so far (read_module) + the exact existing API (module_api, so it calls prior units' real names), generates a grounded Go file, stages it and builds the WHOLE module (stage_build, the oracle), repairs once, registers it. Called by the compose foreach: $input = '<targetpath> <specfile>'. proj = $workspace. All units share package main at the module root, so no imports between units.
summary: Generate one composed Go unit against the accumulated module, build the whole module, repair once, register.
